title: anaphalis subrigida
intro: Anaphalis subrigida, also known as subalpine or alpine pincushion plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are often used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Anaphalis subrigida include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
